title: tagetes micrantha
intro: Tagetes micrantha is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family, commonly known as the small-leaved marigold or Mexican marigold. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Tagetes micrantha include its ability to reduce fever, treat skin conditions, and relieve digestive issues, making it a valuable herb for promoting overall well-being. In herbal preparations, Tagetes micrantha is often used in teas, tinctures, and salves to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health ailments.
